UEs are slightly complex (sniffs of normal) but movements are predominantly monotonous/repetitive.  As lead assessor, will use this score, with details provided below:   isolated neck, just a few trunk (2); UE - amplitude (2); speed (2); space (2); prox/distal rotations not always fluent/elegant (1 & 1); onset/offset - (1 & 1); tremors unilat (1) - right ~2:35  LE amp (1); speed (1); space (1); prox/distal rotations just a few (1 & 1); onset/offset (1 & 1), unilat tremor left foot (~2:06)  no cramped (4)

MW vetted and watched as fourth assessor as follows:  Movement patterns: Atypical foot to foot, UE tremoring (did not mark wiggling-oscillating as seems to be tremors more than true wiggling oscillating)   Head turning, hand to hand, visual exploration, leg lift (no kicking marked as not true decoupling of hip/knees); N > Abnormal = 4  Age adequacy = 2 (atypical foot-to-foot)  Body postures - no head in midline; symmetrical body, no ATN, not great, but somewhat variable finger posture = 4   Stiff movement character = 2  12... total score with absent fidgety (or very infrequent sporadic fidgets - start stop...)
